From Stdlib           Require Import List.
From MetaRocq.Common  Require Import BasicAst Kernames Universes.
From MetaRocq.Utils   Require Import bytestring.
From MetaRocq.Erasure Require Import EAst.
From Agda2Lambox     Require Import CheckWF Eval.
Import ListNotations.

Definition env : global_declarations :=
  [((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "notnot"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tLambda
                nAnon
                (tApp
                   (tConst (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "not"%bs))
                   (tApp (tConst (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "not"%bs)) (tRel 0)))) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "not"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tLambda
                nAnon
                (tCase
                   ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                       inductive_ind := 0 |},
                    0)
                   (tRel 0)
                   [([],
                     tConstruct
                       {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                          inductive_ind := 0 |}
                       1 []);
                    ([],
                     tConstruct
                       {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                          inductive_ind := 0 |}
                       0 [])])) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "double"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tFix
                [{| dname := nNamed "double"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tCase
                           ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |},
                            0)
                           (tRel 0)
                           [([],
                             tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               0 []);
                            ([nAnon],
                             tApp
                               (tConstruct
                                  {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                     inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                  1 [])
                               (tApp
                                  (tConstruct
                                     {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                                        inductive_ind := 0 |}
                                     1 [])
                                  (tApp (tRel 2) (tRel 0))))]);
                    rarg := 0 |}]
                0) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "even"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tFix
                [{| dname := nNamed "odd"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tCase
                           ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |},
                            0)
                           (tRel 0)
                           [([],
                             tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               0 []);
                            ([nAnon], tApp (tRel 2) (tRel 0))]);
                    rarg := 0 |};
                 {| dname := nNamed "even"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tCase
                           ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |},
                            0)
                           (tRel 0)
                           [([],
                             tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               1 []);
                            ([nAnon], tApp (tRel 3) (tRel 0))]);
                    rarg := 0 |}]
                1) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "test"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tApp
                (tConst (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "odd"%bs))
                (tApp
                   (tConstruct
                      {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                         inductive_ind := 0 |}
                      1 [])
                   (tApp
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         1 [])
                      (tConstruct
                         {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                            inductive_ind := 0 |}
                         0 [])))) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "odd"%bs),
    ConstantDecl
      {| cst_body :=
           Some
             (tFix
                [{| dname := nNamed "odd"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tCase
                           ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |},
                            0)
                           (tRel 0)
                           [([],
                             tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               0 []);
                            ([nAnon], tApp (tRel 2) (tRel 0))]);
                    rarg := 0 |};
                 {| dname := nNamed "even"%bs;
                    dbody :=
                      tLambda
                        nAnon
                        (tCase
                           ({| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs);
                               inductive_ind := 0 |},
                            0)
                           (tRel 0)
                           [([],
                             tConstruct
                               {| inductive_mind := (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs);
                                  inductive_ind := 0 |}
                               1 []);
                            ([nAnon], tApp (tRel 3) (tRel 0))]);
                    rarg := 0 |}]
                0) |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Bool"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Bool"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [{| cstr_name := "r#false"%bs; cstr_nargs := 0 |};
                  {| cstr_name := "r#true"%bs; cstr_nargs := 0 |}];
               ind_projs := [] |}] |});
   ((MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "Nat"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Nat"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny;
               ind_ctors :=
                 [{| cstr_name := "zero"%bs; cstr_nargs := 0 |};
                  {| cstr_name := "succ"%bs; cstr_nargs := 1 |}];
               ind_projs := [] |}] |});
   ((MPfile ["LamBox"%bs], "Empty"%bs),
    InductiveDecl
      {| ind_finite := Finite; ind_npars := 0;
         ind_bodies :=
           [{| ind_name := "Empty"%bs; ind_propositional := false;
               ind_kelim := IntoAny; ind_ctors := []; ind_projs := [] |}] |})].

Compute @check_wf_glob eflags env.

Definition prog1 : program :=
  (env, tConst (MPfile ["OddEven"%bs], "test"%bs)).

Compute eval_program prog1.
